query: SELECT s.id, s.name, COUNT(p.id) as product_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.isDrs = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as drs_count FROM stores s LEFT JOIN products p ON p.storeId = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY s.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT s.id, s.name, COUNT(p.id) as product_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.isDrs = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as drs_count FROM stores s LEFT JOIN products p ON p.storeId = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY s.id;
